A.missing: second undergoer is fresh SOMETHING not the-same thing; drops 'again/same'
A.reason: Someone does something after doing something, but no same-thing binding so it fails to capture repetition of the same act.

B.reason: Does the-same thing again after having done it, and does it many times — captures the repeater who does the same thing repeatedly.

C.missing: second undergoer refers to same thing but no 'many times'; only single after
C.reason: Does the same thing after an earlier time, but a single repeat with no iteration is weak for 'repeater'.

D.missing: no same-thing binding for the earlier act; fresh SOMETHING, no iteration
D.reason: Someone does something before doing something else — no same-thing repetition rendered.

E.missing: second undergoer is unbound fresh SOMETHING; no same-thing or many-times
E.reason: Generic 'does something after doing something' without same-thing binding fails to render repetition.
